viirs.source: Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.8277198, based on Annual VNL V2 VIIRS
viirs.note: Rows after 2021 use the nearest available 2021 annual layer. Epoch mode uses representative annual layers to avoid remote-source rate limits.

ghsl.note: Static mode samples selected representative GHSL epochs for all rows to reduce remote IO.

worldcover.source: ESA WorldCover 10 m 2021 v200 COGs on AWS Open Data
